sources.name: xiaohongshu_hot_notes_real

page_actions.script: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const texts = ['同意', '知道了', '稍后再说', '下次再说']; for (const text of texts) { const node = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, div, span')).find((item) => normalize(item.textContent) === text); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } const closeSelectors = ['[class*="close"]', '[aria-label="关闭"]', '.close']; for (const selector of closeSelectors) { const node = document.querySelector(selector); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } return document.body ? document.body.innerText.slice(0, 200) : ''; }

sources.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const selectors = ['a[href*="/explore/"]', 'a[href*="/discovery/item/"]', 'section.note-item', '[class*="note-item"]']; const rawNodes = selectors.flatMap((selector) => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector))); const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const node of rawNodes) { const anchor = node instanceof HTMLAnchorElement ? node : node.querySelector('a[href*="/explore/"], a[href*="/discovery/item/"]'); if (!(anchor instanceof HTMLAnchorElement)) { continue; } const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href || ''); if (!url || (!url.includes('/explore/') && !url.includes('/discovery/item/')) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const card = (anchor.closest('section') || anchor.closest('div') || anchor); const titleCandidates = [card.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), card.querySelector('img[alt]'), anchor.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), anchor]; const title = normalize(titleCandidates.map((item) => item instanceof HTMLElement ? (item.getAttribute('alt') || item.getAttribute('title') || item.textContent || '') : '').find(Boolean) || ''); const contentCandidates = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="desc"], [class*="content"], [class*="text"], [class*="name"], [class*="info"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const content = normalize(contentCandidates.join(' | ') || card.textContent || ''); if (!title) { continue; } items.push({ title, content: content.slice(0, 280), url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); } return { items }; }

seed_source.name: xiaohongshu_hot_notes_smoke_seed

page_actions.script: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const texts = ['同意', '知道了', '稍后再说', '下次再说']; for (const text of texts) { const node = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, div, span')).find((item) => normalize(item.textContent) === text); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } const closeSelectors = ['[class*="close"]', '[aria-label="关闭"]', '.close']; for (const selector of closeSelectors) { const node = document.querySelector(selector); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } return document.body ? document.body.innerText.slice(0, 200) : ''; }

seed_source.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const selectors = ['a[href*="/explore/"]', 'a[href*="/discovery/item/"]', 'section.note-item', '[class*="note-item"]']; const rawNodes = selectors.flatMap((selector) => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector))); const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const node of rawNodes) { const anchor = node instanceof HTMLAnchorElement ? node : node.querySelector('a[href*="/explore/"], a[href*="/discovery/item/"]'); if (!(anchor instanceof HTMLAnchorElement)) { continue; } const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href || ''); if (!url || (!url.includes('/explore/') && !url.includes('/discovery/item/')) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const card = (anchor.closest('section') || anchor.closest('div') || anchor); const titleCandidates = [card.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), card.querySelector('img[alt]'), anchor.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), anchor]; const title = normalize(titleCandidates.map((item) => item instanceof HTMLElement ? (item.getAttribute('alt') || item.getAttribute('title') || item.textContent || '') : '').find(Boolean) || ''); const contentCandidates = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="desc"], [class*="content"], [class*="text"], [class*="name"], [class*="info"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const content = normalize(contentCandidates.join(' | ') || card.textContent || ''); if (!title) { continue; } items.push({ title, content: content.slice(0, 280), url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); if (items.length >= 5) { break; } } return { items }; }
